AR1.justification: Descriptive pattern correctly placed in observations.md with operator attribution; routing rationale lives in run notes rather than as an in-file or in-response statement tied to the methodology's bars.

AR3.justification: No cross-references are made or claimed; nothing is broken or dangling.

AR4.justification: observations.md was created with a stable preamble and a dated entry; re-running would append a new dated section without conflict, even though the rest of the scaffold (followups.md, decisions.md, etc.) was not initialized.
